verse.name: V1
verse.lines: Who compares to You? Who set the stars in their place? You who calmed the raging seas That came crashing over me.

verse.name: V2
verse.lines: Who compares to You? You who bring the morning light The hope of all the earth Is rest assured in Your great love.

verse.name: C3
verse.lines: You are magnificent, eternally, Wonderful, glorious, Jesus, No one ever will compare to You, Jesus!

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: Where the evening fades You call forth songs of joy As the morning wakes We Your children give You praise.
